title: Zero Point Labs
description: Innovative technologies for high-performance spacecraft locomotion.
body:
ZPS addon, adding thrusters and gyros for powering and steering your Valkyrien Skies spaceships!

Thruster:
 - Requires an Ion Thrust Modulator block and an Ion Thruster Exhaust block (adjacent and facing the same direction, see image gallery)
- Supply the Ion Thrust Modulator with FE and a redstone signal for thrust! Thruster strength depends on amount of FE available as well as redstone signal strength.

Gyro:
- Rotates ship when supplied with a redstone signal
